caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio setting. She is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand. To her left is a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red letters. Behind her is a black wall accented by a vertical yellow stripe. The scene is overlaid with branding, including a circular "PODCAST" logo on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" accompanied by a small microphone icon on the right. In the upper right of the background, a small sign reads "Employee Only". Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, maintaining a slight smile and looking toward someone off-screen, with minimal changes in her expression and posture as the clip progresses.
